title: Level 910
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: '''Level 910''': "Thunderous Shallows"}}
[[File:Level 910 bg.png|1920px]]
[[File:Level 910 lightning.png|center|750x750px|link=]] {{Class Custom Image|class=5e - Environmental|hexagon=E|entity=Extreme Environmental Conditions|bg-image=Level 910 Background.png|text-color=#FFFFFF|safety=Unsafe|stability=Secure}}
'''Level 910''' is the 911th level of The Backrooms. {{Blurimage|file=Level 910.png|caption=An image of Level 910.|hovertext=A Lightning Bolt}} == '''''Description'''''==
'''Level 910''' is a vast expanse of shallow water extending out to several hundred kilometers, known for its consistently tumultuous and constant weather patterns. The presence of thunderstorms in this area is documented to quite commonly occur, making it a hazardous environment for those within since interaction with certain areas — due to the water's electrical charge — poses an immediate threat to survival. While individuals can survive the occurrence, the likelihood of doing so is extremely low and should be considered when deciding on '''Level 910'''.
Excluding a few periods of silence, the lightning bolts are persistently striking the waters of '''Level 910'''. The color of these bolts varies greatly, with purple and yellow being the most common; however, it is not uncommon for thunder strikes to also appear in red, cyan, or even green. The intensity of the sound produced by the lightning can serve as an indicator of its proximity to an individual; for instance, if the sound of lightning is heard from a distance, it is likely that the thunderstorm is located at a distance, whereas if the sound is heard loudly and closely, it is likely that the individual is near the storm. {{Blurimage|file=Level 910-2.png|caption=Another image of '''Level 910'''.|hovertext=Cascading Streams}} Clouds aloft in the night sky of '''Level 910''' appears to produce lightning bolts at a faster frequency than expected — an estimated approximately 15 strikes per minute. This signifies that the level may possess a valley of significant, monumental mountains surrounding the shallow waters. Moreover, the trajectory of the winds within the level is occasionally inconsistent and becomes more arbitrary as one traverses deeper into the level; this condition, when paired with the landscape, the hypothesized "bowl" shape of '''Level 910''', and the aforementioned aspect of the winds, creates the adequate circumstances to coerce such phenomena. The inundated surface of '''Level 910''' presents a uniquely challenging environment to traverse, as upon examination, it becomes apparent that the ground is composed of an amalgamation of man-made materials such as plastic and styrofoam, resulting in a deviation in texture and durability and the formation of sinkholes and elevation alterations that can be quite dramatic in certain regions of the level. Additionally, some areas resemble quicksand, further exacerbating the instability of the terrain; this predicament may ultimately culminate in a total immersion of '''Level 910''', which would prompt a slow but steady increase in environmental pitfalls that wanderers would be increasingly susceptible to. Furthermore, it should be noted that these hazards may not be immediately visible to the naked eye, thus making it all the more imperative to be cautious. The presence of water in '''Level 910''' is a mystery, as the amount of rainfall in the level — which hardly occurs — would not be sufficient to create such vast bodies of water, though some theories suggest that an unknown entity or object may have been responsible for rapidly creating large amounts of water. Despite the prevalence of water in the level, it is still possible to find land in certain areas; the shape of these so-called "islands" are oddly symmetrical with sharp edges, and thereby contentious to characterize them as a safe destination to pass due to their figure. Additionally, the islands often have trees growing on them, but it is not practical to use boats to travel between them as the water is highly charged and will destroy any boats that attempt to navigate it.
== '''''Entities'''''== Within the premises of '''Level 910''' there are reports of a spirit/unknown humanoid lurking within the islands of '''Level 910''' that appears to resemble a girl. This girl in question is within the age span of 4-9 and the identity of the girl is still shrouded in mystery — speculation goes that the mysterious girl within '''Level 910''' is irrelevant to the wanderer throughout '''Level 910'''. The girl is '''irrelevant''' and is speculated to have been too tired to have been able to swim up to the surface. This resulted in the girl eventually meeting her slow and painful demise drowning within the charged waters of '''Level 910'''. == '''''Colonies & Outposts'''''== Due to the expansive and perilous nature of '''Level 910''', no establishments can be made. == '''''Entrances & Exits'''''== === '''''Entrances'''''===
* Entering doorways in [[Level 20]] may send one to '''Level 910''' instead of the intended location; * On rare occasions, the pristine water in [[Level 39]]'s tunnels shall act as a mirror to '''Level 910''''s waters — this entrance is accessible when one attempts to submerge themselves; * In certain cases, the automobile of [[Level 178]] shall drive into a body of water, which would initiate a teleportation to '''Level 910''' if one drowns; * Falling through a patch of snow within [[Level 909]], specifically in [[Level 909#The Lantern Walk (灯笼步道)|the Lantern Walk]] region, would infrequently transfer one to '''Level 910'''; * Traversing over a thunderstorm in [[Level 222]] would sometimes lead one to this level.
=== '''''Exits'''''===
* Falling asleep within '''Level 910''' has a small chance of leading you to '''[[Level 666]]'''; * In rare circumstances, there will be a Red Forest within one of the islands, walking into one will lead you to '''[[Level 850]]'''; *'''You...you finally listened to me. [[Level 67|I shall reward you now.]]'''

Don't stop having hopes of freedom, there is a way out.


 Stop trying.















You're in a different place now,















See how you got lost?






















'''Thunderous Shallows''',
















A place sacrificing its true potential,















For few lights lasting a feather.
You may have accidentally fallen by accident [[Level 909|last time]], whether this be your first, second, or tenth time being here; this time, your fate is truly sealed.

'''↪ The cascading flows rush over her body with no disruptions...'''
'''With electrifying freaks of nature striking over the blanket of waters.'''


----
''{{CURRENTDAY}}/{{CURRENTMONTH}}/17381 {{CURRENTTIME}}''
This area is much more uncomforting than the previous one; where and how did I go to land here? I've been trapped for what feels like weeks, the last thing I remember is falling from the snow in that festival themed level and here I came. The island is loomy and big and the water is soaringly hot, and it hurts a little to touch it. But then I feel something pushing me off the comfort of the island, the only thing to keep me alive in this nightmare. The waters hurt so much, I don't have the energy to even scream, but I try to. Unsurprisingly, nothing comes out, not even a muffled sound of me screaming in the waters. I'm not able to swim and it hurts so much being in this water... only God can tell where I'm going to end up after this. It feels like being boiled alive when drenched in this scorching water, please make the pain stop! The pain is miserable!

----
''{{CURRENTDAY}}/{{CURRENTMONTH}}/20192 {{CURRENTTIME}}''
I wake up. I see mother. She's holding me tightly. Why is she crying?

Hello there, reader. Samir here. Thank you for reading up on '''Level 910'''. This level is, as I've told many; '''a sequel to the very big, and (probably) beloved 909, which I and sherls made.''' This level brings on some lore for Level 909 and also a bit more info about a mysterious spirit within Level 909 that followed you around and attempted to help you along the way of Level 909, but now you've made it REALLY MAD, because you just couldn't listen; so mad it now goes on to kill everything that gave you comfort in Level 909 and The Backrooms itself; The Girl. A hidden character within 909 that Sherls wanted to keep secret. This is my and probably Sherls first go at making a sequel level for, well, a level. I told Sherls we could make a sequel level and Sherls loved the idea of a sequel to a level. This level was planned to be a sequel for my level, better known as Level 1822, but Sherls objected to the idea of an 1822 sequel. It was only then we came up with 910 when I realized '''Level 910''' was not a level made yet. Yeah, hope I didn't bore you with this aftertext, because I only wanted to let you know what the level really was about; a level which went from a happy little festival within a Chinese looking environment to a level where you really don't want to escape nor leave the place you were sent to, or else you'll end up maybe dying to the other dangers the other levels or even the level itself may cause to you. So yeah, I'm outta here!
